provenance.basis: Wave 1 official Santa Clara County Parcels excerpt
provenance.extractionProcedure: Select official feature objectid 10649; format the existing situs address fields without changing their values; normalize APN only in the canonical normalizer; omit the large geometry from this derived test input because the complete unchanged geometry remains in the referenced Wave 1 fixture.
provenance.classification: small legally safe deterministic test-only derivation; parcel/address evidence only, not ownership, occupancy, building, roof, or view evidence

permitFixtureProvenance.purpose: Prove that applied, issued, finaled, and expired timestamps remain distinct and that issued/expired work is never promoted to completed work.
permitFixtureProvenance.notClaimed: These permit identifiers and dates are not represented as official source records.
